title: Converting T-SQL code to PL/pgSQL with confidence
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates using Gemini to convert T-SQL stored procedures to PL/pgSQL, including complex refactoring tasks like converting procedures to Common Table Expressions. Gemini provides explanations alongside conversions to help developers learn PostgreSQL.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates using Gemini to convert T-SQL stored procedures to PL/pgSQL, the procedural language used in PostgreSQL. The walkthrough covers complex refactoring, including rewriting stored procedures as Common Table Expressions. Beyond producing the converted code, Gemini supplies explanations alongside each conversion, framing the migration as a way for developers to learn PostgreSQL rather than just translate syntax.
